# TASK_BRIEF_2026-07-01_p0-01-unity-bootstrap.md
# Game: Send in the Clowns | Codename: clowns | Phase: 0 (solo combat toy — "the toy")
# Generated by: technical_designer_agent (Mission Control)
# Route: Unity Hub (project create) + Claude Code CLI (git, asmdefs, folder tree)
# Status: ACTIVE — awaiting execution | Depends on: none
# Format: conforms to intent of CLAUDE_PROJECT_RULES.md §7.2.

## 0. Objective
Create the empty, correctly-configured URP Unity project and repo scaffold for the
solo toy — no gameplay — so every later brief has a clean, non-negotiable-compliant home.

## 1. Why this brief locks NO design choice
It is pure environment. It contains no humor values, no meter behavior, no mechanic
selection. The only decisions it makes are engine/version/VCS config — none of which is
a game-design choice. (`WEAPON_SYSTEM`, roster, tour, progression: untouched.)

## 2. Co-op-forward seams honored
- Seam 7: creates the assembly-definition split and **reserves** `Assets/_clowns/Net/` with
  a `README` (no asmdef yet) so Phase-1 FishNet has a home referencing gameplay, not vice-versa.
- Seams are structural only here; behavior comes in later briefs.

## 3. Prerequisites  (ONE confirm — environment, not design)
- [ ] **Confirm Unity LTS version to freeze.** Workspace candidate is **6000.3.17f1**
      (`PROJECT_STATUS.md` OPEN item). If unconfirmed, DEFAULT to 6000.3.17f1 and record it;
      do not silently pick another. Freezing here satisfies the §6 "LTS version not frozen" item.
- [ ] **Confirm repo name.** Suggested `send-in-the-clowns`. Repo *folder* stays `send_the_clowns`
      per `DEC-2026-06-30-D`. No remote is created by this brief (local only).
- [ ] Unity Hub installed with the chosen LTS version available.

## 4. Unity non-negotiables (apply at project creation)
- Template: **URP (3D)**. (2D/low-poly is a later art call; URP is the frozen pipeline.)
- Version Control Mode: **Visible Meta Files**.
- Asset Serialization: **Force Text**.
- `.meta` files **NOT** git-ignored.
- `.gitignore`: GitHub official **Unity** template.
- **Git LFS** configured for binaries BEFORE the first art asset is committed.
- User content root: **`Assets/_clowns/`**.
- Architecture default: **ScriptableObject-based** (Ryan Hipple).

## 5. Files / dirs to create
Under `unity/unity_clowns/` (canonical per `DEC-2026-06-30-D`):
```
Assets/_clowns/
  Runtime/          Clowns.Runtime.asmdef          (no editor code, no test refs)
    Core/           (registry, events, ownership — filled in TB-03/04)
    Data/           (SO type definitions — filled in TB-02)
    Combat/         (mirth system — filled in TB-03)
    Clown/          (controller — filled in TB-04)
    Enemy/          (temperament, spawner — filled in TB-06)
    Feedback/       (performance hooks — filled in TB-05)
  Editor/           Clowns.Editor.asmdef           (refs Runtime; holds validators/inspectors)
  GameData/         (SO ASSET instances live here — created in later briefs)
  Scenes/           ToyArena.unity                 (empty grey-box scene w/ baked NavMesh floor)
  Art/greybox/      (primitive placeholder prefabs — later briefs)
  Net/              README.md ONLY                 (RESERVED — Phase 1 asmdef slot; do NOT create asmdef)
Logs/               .gitkeep                        (playtest telemetry target — TB-06)
```
- `Clowns.Net/README.md` must state: *"Reserved for Phase 1 FishNet. When created, `Clowns.Net.asmdef`
  references `Clowns.Runtime`, never the reverse. No networking code exists in Phase 0."*

## 6. Ordered steps
1. **[Hub]** Create URP 3D project named per confirm, at `unity/unity_clowns/`, chosen LTS version.
2. **[Editor]** Edit ▸ Project Settings ▸ Editor: Version Control = *Visible Meta Files*,
   Asset Serialization = *Force Text*. Save.
3. **[CLI]** Create the folder tree in §5. Add `Clowns.Runtime.asmdef` (root namespace `Clowns`)
   and `Clowns.Editor.asmdef` (references `Clowns.Runtime`, `includePlatforms: [Editor]`).
4. **[CLI]** Add GitHub Unity `.gitignore`; confirm `*.meta` is NOT ignored.
5. **[CLI]** `git lfs install`; add `.gitattributes` LFS rules for `*.png *.psd *.fbx *.wav *.mp3 *.blend`.
6. **[CLI]** Create empty `ToyArena.unity` with a floor plane + baked NavMesh (Window ▸ AI ▸ Navigation,
   or `NavMeshSurface` if the AI Navigation package is used — record which in `UNITY_CONTEXT.md`).
7. **[CLI]** `git add -A && git commit -m "Phase 0 TB-01: URP project + _clowns scaffold + LFS"`.
8. **[CLI]** Update `unity/UNITY_CONTEXT.md`: record frozen LTS version, NavMesh package choice,
   and that Phase 0 is grey-box solo.

## 7. Guardrails (restate — non-negotiable)
- No gameplay, no humor content, no strings that read as jokes. Placeholder scene is grey primitives.
- Do NOT install FishNet or any networking package. Do NOT create a backend/infra folder.

## 8. Verification (USER confirms)
- [ ] Project opens with zero console errors; enters Play mode on the empty arena.
- [ ] `Assets/_clowns/` tree matches §5; both asmdefs compile.
- [ ] `git status` clean after commit; `.meta` files ARE tracked; LFS attributes present.
- [ ] `Clowns.Net/README.md` exists; no `.asmdef` inside `Net/`.

## 9. Failure modes → diagnosis → fix
- *Console shows asmdef reference errors* → `Clowns.Editor` must reference `Clowns.Runtime` and be
  Editor-only; fix platform list, reimport.
- *`.meta` files ignored* → wrong `.gitignore`; replace with GitHub Unity template, re-add.
- *NavMesh won't bake* → floor not marked Navigation Static / missing AI Navigation package; install
  the package or mark static, rebake.
- *LFS not catching binaries* → run `git lfs install` in-repo before first binary commit; re-track.

## 10. Exit gate (binary)
Project opens clean, both asmdefs compile, git+LFS committed, `Net/` slot reserved. → unlocks TB-02.

## 11. Out of scope for this brief
Any SO types, any component, any humor data, any input handling, any networking.
